data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Ite: For quickly toughening up POKéMON,\nitems are the best.\pPROTEIN boosts ATTACK, and CALCIUM\nraises SP. ATK.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Wan: I want my POKéMON to have more\nendurance.\pI'm trying to decide whether to raise\nDEFENSE with IRON, or SP. DEF with ZINC.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Gav: I gave a CARBOS to my POKéMON and its\nSPEED went up.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Unu: ESSENTIALS FOR UNBEATABLE TRAINERS\n3F: BATTLE COLLECTION
